title: Regional payment exceptions routed to the wrong settlement path
incident_summary: European payment failures spike while other regions stay healthy, pointing to a routing exception.

alerts.title: EU decline spike
alerts.content: EU decline rate jumped from 6% to 41%.

logs.title: Region override rule applied
logs.content: router policy forced eu-west traffic to us-east primary gateway.

logs.title: Issuer timeout noise
logs.content: Issuer timeouts are flat and within baseline noise.

logs.title: Mandate unsupported error
logs.content: gateway responded mandate_not_supported for EU recurring payments.

runbook_snippets.title: Regional routing rollback
runbook_snippets.content: Restore EU routing policy to eu-central gateway and replay failed intents.

runbook_snippets.title: Increase retries
runbook_snippets.content: Retry increase is ineffective for deterministic mandate failures.

timeline_notes.title: Router policy edit
timeline_notes.content: Ops policy update changed eu-west priority route to us-east.

timeline_notes.title: Issuer bulletin
timeline_notes.content: Issuer posted advisory for minor auth latency but not regional mandate failures.

red_herrings: Latency warning on US-east gateway appears severe but does not explain EU-specific mandate errors.
true_root_cause: Routing policy misrouted EU traffic to unsupported US gateway
true_root_cause_aliases: eu payments sent to wrong region gateway
true_mitigation: Restore EU regional routing policy and replay failed payment intents
true_mitigation_aliases: rollback payments region routing and retry failed intents
route EU traffic back to eu-central gateway
